nl_query: For each department, show the department name, number of courses, number of faculty members, number of active boards, number of scripts currently in evaluation, and the average marks awarded per script.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.name AS academic_unit_name, COUNT(DISTINCT au.id) AS course_count, COUNT(DISTINCT fc.employee_id) AS faculty_count, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS active_board_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN asa.is_active = TRUE THEN a.id END) AS scripts_in_evaluation, AVG(ea.total_marks) AS average_evaluation_marks_per_script
FROM   academic_unit au
JOIN   academic_unit_closure c ON c.ancestor_id = au.id
JOIN   academic_unit course ON course.id = c.descendant_id
JOIN   faculty_course_mapping fc ON fc.course_id = au.id
JOIN   board b ON b.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment asa ON asa.script_id = a.id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = asa.id
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'COURSE'
GROUP  BY au.name
ORDER  BY course_count DESC;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: missing FROM-clause entry for table "a"
LINE 1: ....id JOIN script_assignment asa ON asa.script_id = a.id JOIN ...
